'''''Omicron''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|''Gamma''-class assault shuttle]] that was stationed near [[Comm Center]]. It attempted to stop the [[Azzameen family]] from hacking into one of the station's satellites by deploying [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|spacetroopers]]. It was either driven off or destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
